function.name: app_manager_find_apps
function.description: Searches a specific application store for apps matching a text-based description.

store_name.description: The globally unique identifier for the application store to search.

app_description.description: A natural language string used to query and filter applications.

limit.description: The maximum number of applications to return. If set to 0, no limit is applied.

function.name: app_manager_install_app
function.description: Fetches a specific application from a store and performs installation on the local system. Takes care to resolve dependencies.

store_name.description: The globally unique identifier for the source application store.

app_name.description: The unique name of the application within the specified store.

function.name: app_manager_list_installed_apps
function.description: Retrieves a comprehensive list of all applications currently installed on the local system.

filter.description: A filtering criterion used to narrow down the list ('all', 'upgradable', 'by name ascendent', etc.).

limit.description: The maximum number of applications to return. If set to 0, no limit is applied.

function.name: app_manager_uninstall_app
function.description: Removes an installed application from the local system.

app_name.description: The name of the application to be removed.

function.name: app_manager_update_app
function.description: Updates a local application from its original installation store; this may trigger dependencies updates.

app_name.description: The name of the local application to be updated.
